text.title: Team Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the team been together ≥3 weeks with a retro history?

conclusion.verdict: Wait until stable signals appear or use Forming-only charter
Author team charter with decision rights first

branch.when: stable == true AND charter_present == true AND skill_matrix_present == false

conclusion.verdict: Build skills matrix; flag single-point skills

branch.when: stable == true AND charter_present == true AND skill_matrix_present == true

conclusion.verdict: Diagnose stage from retro signals + adapt facilitation

example.trace: stable=true → charter_present=true → skill_matrix_present=true → diagnose stage = Norming → facilitate to Performing.
